name: nelson
description: Coordinate agent teams in Claude Code using a Royal Navy inspired command structure and operating procedures. Provides structured sailing orders, battle plans, action stations, and a captain's log to manage complex tasks from single-session work through to multi-agent squadrons.
scan_summary: Well-structured multi-agent coordination skill with clean SKILL.md, MIT license, linting/lint configs, no executable scripts with dangerous patterns. Contains check-references.sh and count-tokens.py helper scripts that are benign. Uses established plugin marketplace format. No hooks, no network calls, no credential handling. Reference files are pure Markdown templates.

findings_summary.notes: Clean, well-documented skill with clear multi-agent workflow structure. Markdown-only skill content with reference templates. Helper scripts are read-only/informational. No security concerns identified. Minor: no pinned dependencies, Python helper is bundled but only reads local files.
